hero.title: Turan Hidayetov
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.description: A full-stack developer specialized in PHP, Laravel, and MySQL with expertise in RESTful APIs, MVC architecture, and backend development.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Turan Hidayetov, a full-stack web developer with expertise in PHP and Laravel backend development, RESTful APIs, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and MVC architecture. I have worked on diverse projects including courier, logistics, warehouse management, and government portal platforms.

getting-started-nextjs.title: Getting Started with Next.js
getting-started-nextjs.description: Learn how to build modern web applications with Next.js
getting-started-nextjs.paragraph1: Next.js is a React framework that enables you to build fast, SEO-friendly web applications. In this post, we'll explore the basics of Next.js and how to get started.
getting-started-nextjs.why_desc: Next.js provides many features out of the box, including:
getting-started-nextjs.start_desc: To create a new Next.js project, run the following command:
getting-started-nextjs.conclusion_desc: Next.js is an excellent choice for building modern web applications. With its powerful features and great developer experience, it's no wonder it's one of the most popular frameworks today.
